mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM knowledge_entities WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT * FROM knowledge_entities WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%') ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM knowledge_entities ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 2000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_entities ( id, name, type, description, aliases, embedding, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{type}, #{description}, #{aliases}, #{embedding}, #{metadata}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_entities SET description = #{description}, aliases = #{aliases}, embedding = #{embedding}, metadata = #{metadata}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_relations ( id, source_entity_id, target_entity_id, relation_type, weight, metadata, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sourceEntityId}, #{targetEntityId}, #{relationType}, #{weight}, #{metadata}, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE weight = GREATEST(weight, VALUES(weight)), metadata = VALUES(metadata)
